rules.description: Replace unsafe memcpy calls with a stub that returns immediately. In a real hardening scenario you would redirect to a bounds-checked wrapper instead.
rules.condition: if memcpy is detected in the import table

rules.description: Replace memmove calls with a no-op stub. Demonstrates patching a second dangerous import in the same pass.
rules.condition: if memmove is detected in the import table

rules.description: Replace strcpy with a stub that returns null, preventing unbounded string copies.
rules.condition: if strcpy is detected in the import table

rules.description: Replace sprintf with a stub that returns -1, flagging it as disabled.
rules.condition: if sprintf is detected in the import table

rules.description: Replace gets with an immediate return. gets has no safe upper bound on input length.
rules.condition: if gets is detected in the import table
